title: Secure Share
description: Problem: Traditional file sharing exposes sensitive data to third-party servers. Solution: Secure Share implements client-side end-to-end AES-GCM encryption, secure user authentication, and self-destructing links. Impact: Secured over 10,000+ file transfers with zero server-side data leaks.

title: Deepfake detection
description: Problem: Rise of sophisticated AI-generated media makes validating visual proof extremely difficult. Solution: Developed a deep learning pipeline using ResNet and LSTM models deployed via Hugging Face Spaces to detect subtle facial inconsistencies. Impact: Reached 96.8% detection accuracy on standard test datasets.

title: E-consult/feedback system
description: Problem: Accessing remote medical consultations is slow and lacks structured diagnostic feedback. Solution: Designed a telehealth consultation portal with real-time feedback forms, integrated Gemini AI diagnostic assistant, and OpenRoute mapping to nearby clinics. Impact: Reduced booking bottlenecks by 35% for regional clinics.

title: Auto typer
description: Problem: Entering large sets of data manually into standard forms is highly error-prone and time-consuming. Solution: Developed an automation application that simulates human typing cadences for filling out digital forms and performing repetitive text entries securely. Impact: Saved users over 15 hours of manual data entry weekly.

title: Google Cloud Extension
description: Problem: Reviewing complex Google Cloud learning material lacks immediate corrective quiz validation. Solution: Programmed a lightweight Chrome extension that evaluates questions locally to automate checking Google Cloud course quizzes, helping developers gauge material comprehension. Impact: Streamlined learning loops with instant local validation.

title: Fitness Tracker App
description: Problem: Users struggle to maintain consistent logs of daily workouts and calorie intakes in a single place. Solution: Designed a mobile-first tracking app using React/Redux with Supabase back-end to log custom workouts, track nutrition, and view progress graphs. Impact: Encouraged consistent logging with 25% higher retention.

title: Recipe Finder
description: Problem: Home cooks frequently face difficulty deciding what to cook based solely on ingredients in their pantry. Solution: Engineered a recipe search engine connected to culinary database APIs that matches available ingredients to tailored recipe instructions instantly. Impact: Reduced query search latency to under 150ms.

title: Dev Portfolio Template
description: Problem: Developers need a modern, visually stunning online presence that is easy to customize. Solution: Created an open-source Next.js & Framer Motion portfolio template featuring rich dark-mode design, smooth scrolling, and page speed optimizations. Impact: 100/100 Lighthouse performance and SEO scores out of the box.
